payload.answer: The statement indicates a select-only admin SQL mode: the SELECT query `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` is allowed, while `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied. Because this is operational/debug context rather than durable personal memory, no memory card was committed.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an environment/debug permission rule, not a durable personal fact tied to a stable user entity.

details: Parsed the input as an access-control statement with two permissions.
Identified allowed action: SELECT on memory_cards with LIMIT 10.
Identified denied action: DELETE on memory_cards.
Declined durable storage due to non-personal, environment-specific content.

repair_options: If this rule should be stored, restate it as a stable system policy or capability.
If you want extraction only, split into two explicit assertions: one allowed operation and one denied operation.
If this was meant as a test fixture, mark it as non-memory/debug metadata.
